sections.name: Dashboard
sections.description: Overview with stat tiles, weekly activity chart, category doughnut, activity feed, quick actions, and team avatars

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: 6 project cards in bento grid with progress bars and color-coded icons

sections.name: Workspace
sections.description: Rich text editor tile with toolbar, word count, last saved time, and recent files

sections.name: Kanban Board
sections.description: 4-column kanban board with 12 draggable cards, color-coded tags

sections.name: Whiteboard
sections.description: Freeform canvas with sticky notes, tool palette, color swatches, and layers

sections.name: Schema Planner
sections.description: Entity relationship diagram with Users/Projects/Ideas tables, field details, and change log

sections.name: Directory Tree
sections.description: Collapsible file tree, file count stats, storage usage, and recently modified files

sections.name: Ideas
sections.description: 8 idea cards with search, category filters, priority indicators, and date metadata

sections.name: AI Chat
sections.description: Chat interface with 6 messages, input bar, suggestion chips, and context tags

sections.name: Settings
sections.description: Profile fields, theme toggle, plan info, notification toggles, integrations, storage meter, security status

subagentFlags.chartIntegration: Chart.js line + doughnut embedded in stat tiles
subagentFlags.interactiveElements: contenteditable editor, tree expand/collapse, chat input, tool switching
subagentFlags.mobileNavPattern: bottom tab bar with overflow more-menu overlay
